channel.title: Shreyas Korad — Writing
channel.description: Articles and insights on learning design, gamification, and L&D strategy.

item.title: A weekly decision memo for managers under delivery pressure
item.description: Execution-centered weekly learning loop for managers with a concrete test around adoption within one sprint, a real workflow checkpoint, and a clear next action.

item.title: A weekly execution memo for managers and team leads
item.description: One decision in the weekly operations standup, owned by a team lead, measured through first-pass quality, with a concrete next move.
